TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Alex_Blackwell, title = Alex_Blackwell, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alex_Blackwell} }

S.FORM: == Alex Blackwell == Alex Blackwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 6, Alex Blackwell, squliq na p'unro. Alex Blackwell hya ga wal malax senmong pgnaw mari na Amirika. pinqwasan nya' biru' Alex Blackwell hya ga minqwas biru' squ gaku' kya Monmouth College. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing(1992-1993) plpgun ingalan nya' tinsu' minxal ga 1.3 teng. ru min 0.9 zmingat mari' na sinngusan naha'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== Alex Blackwell == Alex Blackwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 6, Alex Blackwell, squliq na p'unro. Alex Blackwell hya ga wal malax senmong pgnaw mari na Amirika. pinqwasan nya' biru' Alex Blackwell hya ga minqwas biru' squ gaku' kya Monmouth College. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing(1992-1993) plpgun ingalan nya' tinsu' minxal ga 1.3 teng. ru min 0.9 zmingat mari' na sinngusan naha'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == alex ő≤la ¶~ ®kwell == alex ő≤la ¶~ ®kwell s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, alex ő≤la ¶~ ®kwell, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. alex ő≤la ¶~ ®kwell ńßja …£a wal malax s~…ēenmoŇč p…£naw mari na amirika. pinqwas~…ēan nja Ē ő≤iru Ē alex ő≤la ¶~ ®kwell ńßja …£a minqwas~…ē ő≤iru Ē s~…ēqu …£aku Ē kja monmoutńß ¶~ ®olle…£e. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč(****-****) plp…£un iŇčalan nja Ē tins~…ēu Ē minxal …£a *.* teŇč. ru min *.* zmiŇčat mari Ē na s~…ēinŇčus~…ēan nańßa Ē. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
